data.title: Git workflow documentation added to CLAUDE.md
data.description:
## Summary

Performed comprehensive git/GitHub status checkup and added complete Git Workflow section to [CLAUDE.md](<http://CLAUDE.md>).

## Changes

* Added Branch Strategy (git-flow model)
* Added Development Process (8-step workflow)
* Added Branch Naming Convention
* Added CI/CD Integration details
* Added Automated Claude Integration docs
* Added Quick Reference Commands
* Documented workflow discrepancies

## Status

* Develop is 6 commits ahead of master
* Latest tags: 0.0.3, 0.0.2, 0.0.1
* Recent PR #37 merged successfully

## Commit

46dc02d - Add comprehensive Git Workflow section to [CLAUDE.md](<http://CLAUDE.md>)
